catalyst_cost_signal: [review_assessment] high Mo loading may affect catalyst cost; no prices reported
purification_cost_signal: [review_assessment] low TGA carbon content and mixed fibers imply a high purification/separation burden
scale_signal_reported: Authors describe a large-scale reactor (~100 mm i.d.); actual run used 0.1 g catalyst.
scale_up_issue: Low yield and non-uniform product; throughput, lifetime, conversion and continuous operation not reported.
safety_risk: [review_assessment] CH4/H2 at 900 °C; combustible gas and high-temperature operation
major_cost_driver: [review_assessment] Ar/H2 consumption, 900 °C heating, Mo content and purification burden
recommended_next_action: Retain as control when reproducing SG-2; do not prioritize as a production route.
missing_critical_fields: pressure; CH4 conversion; carbon efficiency; catalyst lifetime; continuous operation; actual throughput; purification mass balance; residual metal
review_note: [review_assessment] Valuable mainly for showing why air decomposition is unfavorable.
evidence_text: Air-prepared SG-1 has the lowest BET area, 73% yield, 43% TGA carbon and mixed carbon morphology.

catalyst_cost_signal: [review_assessment] high Mo loading may affect catalyst cost; no prices reported
purification_cost_signal: [review_assessment] 85% TGA carbon is promising, but MgO/Fe-Mo removal and application-grade purity were not evaluated
scale_signal_reported: Authors describe large-scale synthesis and a ~100 mm i.d. reactor; actual run used 0.1 g catalyst.
scale_up_issue: Gas utilization, heat/mass transfer, catalyst lifetime, pressure drop and continuous operation not reported.
safety_risk: [review_assessment] CH4/H2 at 900 °C; combustible gas and high-temperature operation
major_cost_driver: [review_assessment] Ar/H2 consumption, 900 °C heating, Mo content and downstream catalyst/support removal
reported_best_condition_summary: Fe:Mo:MgO = 1:1.5:10; citrate sol-gel; Ar decomposition at 700 °C for 2 h; CH4 growth at 900 °C for 30 min
reviewed_suitable_condition: Prioritize SG-2 as the first reproduction candidate, while measuring gas conversion and purification burden.
recommended_next_action: Reproduce SG-2; verify 452% weight-gain yield, carbon selectivity, residual Fe/Mo/MgO, batch repeatability and lower Ar/H2 demand.
missing_critical_fields: pressure; CH4 conversion; carbon efficiency; catalyst lifetime; continuous operation; actual throughput; purification mass balance; residual metal; CNT length
review_note: [review_assessment] Strong paper-level candidate, but industrial suitability remains unproven because conversion, lifetime and purification data are absent.
evidence_text: SG-2 is the best reported run: 202 m²/g catalyst, 452% yield, 85% TGA carbon and uniform 4-8 nm t-MWCNTs.

catalyst_cost_signal: [review_assessment] high Mo loading may affect catalyst cost; no prices reported
purification_cost_signal: [review_assessment] 82% TGA carbon is promising, but MgO/Fe-Mo removal and application-grade purity were not evaluated
scale_signal_reported: Authors describe a large-scale reactor (~100 mm i.d.); actual run used 0.1 g catalyst.
scale_up_issue: H2 catalyst decomposition adds hazard and gas demand; lifetime, conversion and continuous operation not reported.
safety_risk: [review_assessment] H2 decomposition at 700 °C plus CH4/H2 growth at 900 °C
major_cost_driver: [review_assessment] H2/Ar consumption, 900 °C heating, Mo content and downstream catalyst/support removal
reported_best_condition_summary: Fe:Mo:MgO = 1:1.5:10; citrate sol-gel; H2 decomposition at 700 °C for 2 h; CH4 growth at 900 °C for 30 min
reviewed_suitable_condition: Use as a direct comparison to SG-2 to determine whether H2 decomposition offers any reproducible benefit.
recommended_next_action: Compare SG-3 with SG-2 under identical batches; test whether the extra H2 preparation step is justified by product consistency.
missing_critical_fields: pressure; CH4 conversion; carbon efficiency; catalyst lifetime; continuous operation; actual throughput; purification mass balance; residual metal; CNT length
review_note: [review_assessment] Good-quality product but lower yield, larger mean diameter and lower Raman IG/ID than SG-2.
evidence_text: SG-3 gives 210 m²/g catalyst, 370% yield, 82% TGA carbon and uniform 4-9 nm t-MWCNTs.
